TextENGNew: ``Hey, Satoko. Come to think of it, your birthday is coming up soon, isn't it?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? Oh, yes... I suppose it is...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Satoko, who was usually brimming with energy and cheerfulness, answered in an uncharacteristically subdued voice, trailing off vaguely. If it was about her own birthday, she should have been at least a little embarrassed or happy...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Or... was the shock from earlier still lingering...?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Since it's coming up, let me get you a present. What do you want? Or would you prefer a cake?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, n-no... you really don't need to bother. Birthdays come around every year, after all...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What are you talking about? It's a celebration of becoming one year older--of course it's something to celebrate! Don't be shy, just accept it gracefully. In return, you can get me something next year.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huh? Keiichi-san, has your birthday already passed?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Yep. Probably the earliest birthday in the whole class. That's one thing I'll never lose to anyone on.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...I hardly think racing to grow old before everyone else is something to boast about. Do you truly find it so delightful to be charging headlong toward old age?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What?! It's not 'growing old'--it's 'growing up'! Learn the nuances of the Japanese language before you open your mouth!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh ho ho ho! I have cultivated a deep respect for the elderly! So as a gift, I shall provide Keiichi-san with a nice hot cup of bancha tea with his lunch tomorrow! Or would you prefer kelp tea, perhaps?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: With that, Satoko's signature cackle rang out. ...Good--it seemed her spirits were finally returning. Inwardly, I breathed a sigh of relief.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Grrrr! That does it! Satoko, get over here!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh ho ho ho ho! Come and get me, Mr. Ogre--catch me if you can!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And with that, Satoko launched into a furious standing sprint on her bicycle. Not to be outdone, I put all my strength into the pedals and gave chase.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
